Corporate
Information

WeTrade Capital (Australia) Pty Ltd (ACN 640 159 922, ABN 29 640 159 922) is financial services provider offering liquidity and execution services exclusively to wholesale clients.

Our Mission

WeTrade Australia focuses on delivering stable liquidity access, efficient execution, and infrastructure aligned with institutional trading requirements.

Part of the WeTrade Australia

WeTrade Australia forms part of the broader WeTrade Group, an international network supporting trading, technology, and market infrastructure initiatives across multiple jurisdictions.

MarketEngagement

The group supports institutional and professional market participants through its trading and technology ecosystem. Its presence spans key markets, enabling consistent engagement and operational coverage.

BrandPartnerships

The group maintains an international presence through brand partnerships, including with Paris Saint-Germain, and continues to invest in trading technology and market connectivity.

Infrastructure andTechnology Capability

The group operates on a broader infrastructure and technology framework developed across its ecosystem. This includes platform development, system integration, and operational capabilities designed to support scalable and consistent deployment.

Built forInstitutional Clients

Access tailored liquidity and technology solutions driven by global group-level standards, with structured and professional onboarding support.

Privacy and Collection Statement

Download PDF

These documents are provided to wholesale clients only, as defined in section 761G of the Corporations Act 2001 (Cth). If you require an alternative format or have questions about any document, please contact us.

Send Us a
Message

Our team is here to help. Contact us with any questions about our services via email at support@wetrade.au.

By clicking “Send Message” you agree to Wetrade Australia’s Privacy Policy and Collection Statement. You agree to be contacted by WeTrade Australia via phone or email with promotions, products and services offered by WeTrade Australia. You agree that you consider yourself as a wholesale client under s761G of the Corporations Act (2001) (Cth).

FX Liquidity

Institutional liquidity solutions designed for connectivity, pricing access, and liquidity management across global markets.

Liquidity forInstitutional Trading

Get access to external liquidity sources across FX pairs, tailored to enhance trading performance and automate risk management.

AggregatedPricing

Institutional liquidity solutions provide market coverage and improved execution quality, enabling access to institutional pricing across varying market conditions.

OptimisedExecution

Infrastructure designed to support efficient execution. This helps minimise slippage and rejection rates, particularly during periods of increased volatility and market activity.

GlobalRelationship

Connectivity to international liquidity providers and data centres across financial hubs. This enables access to liquidity pools and ensures execution across regions and time zones.

WeTrade Australia

WeTrade Capital (Australia) Pty Ltd trading as WeTrade Australia (hereinafter referred to as “WeTrade Australia”, “we”, “us”) (ABN 29 640 159 922) holds Australian Financial Services Licence No. 544624 and is the issuer of financial products described on this website. WeTrade Australia’s registered address is Level 17, 123 Pitt Street, Sydney NSW 2000.

Risk Warning

Trading derivatives, including over-the-counter Margin FX contracts and/or Contracts for Difference (CFDs) limited to foreign exchange underlying assets, carries a significant level of risk and may not suit all investors. You may lose substantially more than your initial investment. When trading our derivative products, you do not acquire entitlement, right or obligation to the underlying financial assets. Past performance does not indicate future performance and tax laws are subject to change. Fees (commission, interest, administration fees, swap charges, volume fees, margin and other fees and charges) may apply.

The information on this website is general in nature and does not account for your personal objectives, financial situation, or needs. Read all Legal Documents carefully and seek independent professional advice before making any investment or trading decision.

Wholesale Clients Only

Our services and products are provided only to “wholesale clients” as defined in section 761G of the Corporations Act 2001 (Cth) and are not offered to retail clients. As such, we are not required to, and have not, prepared any disclosure documents required for retail clients under Chapter 7 of the Corporations Act. Our Legal Documents can be accessed here.

By accessing this website, you represent that you meet the wholesale client criteria under section 761G. If not, you should not rely on this website or seek to engage our services.

Website Disclaimer

This website is owned and operated by WeTrade Australia. Our services are directed at wholesale clients, including licensed financial services entities, in Australia and other permitted jurisdictions. This website is not intended for use in the United States or any jurisdiction where such use would be contrary to local law or would require us to obtain a licence, registration, or regulatory approval.

Translations are provided for convenience only; the English version prevails in the event of any inconsistency. This website is governed by the laws of New South Wales and the Commonwealth of Australia and is not intended for use in any jurisdiction where such use would require us to obtain a licence, registration, or regulatory approval.

Links to third-party websites are provided for convenience only. WeTrade Australia does not endorse, control, or accept responsibility for the accuracy, completeness, reliability, or content of any third-party website or material accessible through such links.

By using this website, you acknowledge that you have read and agreed to the terms of this disclaimer.
